description.value:
Often considered the greatest warriors within madrosarai culture, red-blooded madrosarais have a strong association with unleashing their emotions in acceptably controlled bursts. The crimson-red blood grants you a connection with great madrosarai warriors of the past. You struggle to control your temper but can unleash it in moments of pure aggression at the pitch of battle.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Controlled Rage] action.
